headlines.headline: Dralol Computing sees mixed results in supply chain optimization pilot program

sentiment.reasoning: Mixed results in a pilot program create uncertainty regarding the success and scalability of the initiative.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
